data.title: Atlas Raises $6M Seed Led by Accel and Stellaris to Power the Next Global Accounting Firm
data.description: In Mumbai, India, on April 9, 2026, Atlas, a technology company based in Singapore, revealed a successful seed funding round, with a total of $6 million raised. Accel and Stellaris, prominent early-stage venture capital firms in India, jointly led the funding. The secured capital will be utilized for various purposes, such as...
The May iron ore contract in Singapore dropped 3.4%, closing at $102.1 per metric ton.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Russell Cellular Under Investigation for Data Breach of Over 6 Million Customer and Employee Records
data.description: Investigation by the law firm Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco has been initiated into a data breach that resulted in the unauthorized access to the sensitive data of 6.3 million individuals comprising customers and employees of Russell Cellular, a Verizon authorized retailer located in Missouri. The incident occurred on March 17, 2026.

data.title: TomTom launches Unified Speed Restrictions for higher-precision speed data across ISA, ADAS and automation
data.description: In Amsterdam on April 9, 2026, TomTom (TOM2) unveiled Unified Speed Restrictions, a cutting-edge service aimed at providing up-to-date and precise speed data. This offering is tailored to align with worldwide regulatory standards and cater to the evolving Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). Unified Speed Restrictions empowers automakers to surpass Intelligent Speed Assistance (ISA) mandates, ensuring enhanced accuracy in speed information dissemination.

data.title: World's First CAR-T Therapy for Solid Tumors Available in China Soon
data.description: A revolutionary CAR-T cell therapy for advanced gastrointestinal cancers is anticipated to be launched in China by mid-2026, offering a ray of hope for patients with advanced gastric and pancreatic cancers. This groundbreaking treatment signifies a significant advancement in the medical field. The therapy is set to provide potential benefits to a substantial number of individuals affected by these aggressive forms of cancer.
The May iron ore contract in Singapore dropped 3%, with SZZFK6 leading the activity.

data.title: Global Binder Jet Market Set for Strong Growth as Automation and Smart Manufacturing Drive Demand | Future Market Insights (FMI)
data.description: In a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights, it was revealed that the global binder jet market based in Newark, Del., is experiencing rapid growth due to the shift towards smart manufacturing and Industry 4.0. The market was valued at USD 14.41 billion in 2025 and is projected to continue this upward trend.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Mercor.io Corporation Under Investigation for Data Breach of Records
data.description: An investigation by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco, as of April 9, 2026, reveals a data breach impacting individuals linked to Mercor.io Corporation in California. The breach resulted in unauthorized entry to sensitive information. The breach affects a substantial number of individuals as part of the artificial intelligence recruiting company Mercor.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: DocketWise Under Investigation for Data Breach of Over 116,000 Records
data.description: An inquiry is being conducted by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP into a cyber incident that resulted in the unauthorized entry to confidential data belonging to 116,666 clients of law firm patrons of DocketWise, a Texas-headquartered platform specializing in immigration and case management solutions. The breach occurred on April 9, 2026, with the mentioned law firm customers being affected.

data.title: Novartis announces expansion of community health programs to close gaps in heart disease and cancer care, targeting more than 30 countries by 2030
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Novartis revealed plans to enhance initiatives aimed at identifying and assisting individuals with heart disease and cancer in underserved areas globally. This development is crucial as tackling chronic illnesses faces obstacles in various nations. Novartis intends to expand its three unique community healthcare strategies, which target bridging healthcare disparities for marginalized populations, from 11 to over 30 countries by 2030.
